heading: Annual revision of recommendations
label: 2223d Annual revision of recommendations
text: After the submission of the report cited in , the working group established under shall meet as needed, but at least once every 12 months, to review and recommend changes and additions to the report cited in , that are necessary and appropriate for operational personnel at the local level.section 2223c of this titlesection 2223b of this titlesection 2223c of this title
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Firefighters’ Safety Study Act, and not as part of the Federal Fire Prevention and Control Act of 1974 which comprises this chapter.
